message:
feat(cli): add session diagnose command

Adds `brenner session diagnose --thread-id <id>` command that:
- Analyzes DELTA messages in a thread for parsing issues
- Detects inline JSON without fenced ```delta blocks
- Reports valid/invalid delta block counts per message
- Provides remediation template for malformed deltas
- Supports --json flag for machine-readable output

Also adds unit tests for inline JSON detection scenarios.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
